rows.description: Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and confirmed by visual inspection. Text is centered on the page.

rows.description: Decr. 15. For serving Merton to Michs.
rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by visual inspection (15s 0d). Description 'Michs.' chosen from gemini-flash, which is clearer than gpt-5-mini's 'Mil.'. All values in range.
rows.english_description: Payment for serving at Merton up to Michaelmas (service duty payment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for serving at Merton up to Michaelmas, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.description: N.B. there are 40s. [To John Townſend, a City Tax paid but not entred last year.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are £0 0s 0d (gpt-5-mini was correct on pounds). Description is a combination: primary text and interlinear note are taken from gemini-flash's comprehensive approach, with 'Townſend' and 'City' corrected based on image for old script forms.
rows.english_description: City tax paid to John Townsend; noted as having not been entered in the previous year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: City tax paid to John Townsend, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Oliver Bib. Lect: of Michells Benefaction -
rows.notes: Amounts (2s 10d) confirmed by visual inspection. Description derived from visual verification, 'Bib. Lect: of Michells Benefaction' is clear.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Oliver Bib, the lecturer under Michell's benefaction.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Oliver Bib, the lecturer under Michell's benefaction, amounting to £0 2s 10d.

rows.description: Put into the College Chest in Presence of Messfars Upton Richards, Saunders &c.
rows.notes: Amounts (£400 0s 0d) confirmed by visual inspection. Description updated based on visual, 'Messrs' written as 'Messfars', and 'Saunders &c.' is clear. gpt-5-mini noted surname uncertainty, which was helpful.
rows.english_description: Sum placed into the college chest in the presence of Messrs Upton, Richards, Saunders and others.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Sum placed into the college chest in the presence of Messrs Upton, Richards, Saunders and others, amounting to £400 0s 0d.

rows.description: Put into the College Chest in Presence of Messfars & Upton, Richards & Weston &c.
rows.notes: Amounts (£100 0s 0d) confirmed by visual inspection. Description derived from visual verification; this is a full, distinct entry, not a continuation of description from row 5 as gemini-flash suggested.
rows.english_description: Sum placed into the college chest in the presence of Messrs Upton, Richards, Weston and others.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Sum placed into the college chest in the presence of Messrs Upton, Richards, Weston and others, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: 1773. Jan. 2d To the Poor of Oxford
rows.notes: gemini-flash's rows 7 and 8 were extra/missegmented and have been dropped. This row corresponds to gpt-5-mini's Row 7. Amounts visually verified as 5 shillings, 0 pence (gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed 5 in pounds).
rows.english_description: Alms given to the poor of Oxford.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Alms given to the poor of Oxford, amounting to £0 5s 0d.

rows.description: 3d Mr. Thomson a Bill for going to Few Yardington &c
rows.notes: Amounts (£1 11s 6d) and description visually verified. gpt-5-mini was correct on amounts. gemini-flash was incorrect on amounts for this row.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Thomson for travelling to Yardington and related expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Thomson for travelling to Yardington and related expenses, amounting to £1 11s 6d.

rows.description: 12th Sent a Bill to Mr. Taylor for purchasing Stock
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of £370 0s 0d. gemini-flash misparsed digits across columns, reading £3 7s 0d.
rows.english_description: Bill sent to Mr Taylor for the purchase of stock (financial investment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bill sent to Mr Taylor for the purchase of stock, amounting to £370 0s 0d.

rows.description: Feb.10th To the same to complete the Purchase of 514. Stock
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms £81 0s 9d. gpt-5-mini correctly identified pounds and pence, gemini-flash missed the pounds amount entirely.
rows.english_description: Further payment to Mr Taylor to complete the purchase of stock (514 shares/units).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Further payment to Mr Taylor to complete the purchase of stock, amounting to £81 0s 9d.

rows.description: To the same for Trouble in purchasing receiving &c
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms £3 3s 3d. gpt-5-mini's output was correct, despite its note indicating confusion. gemini-flash missed the pounds amount.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Taylor for trouble and expenses in purchasing and receiving stock.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Taylor for trouble and expenses in purchasing and receiving stock, amounting to £3 3s 3d.

rows.description: 15 To Mr. John Walker for the City Freehold
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of £80 0s 0d. gemini-flash misidentified column, reading 8 shillings.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr John Walker for the purchase of a city freehold (acquisition of property).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr John Walker for the purchase of a city freehold, amounting to £80 0s 0d.

rows.description: To the same, Fees for Conveyance
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of 8 shillings, 8 pence. gemini-flash missed the pence amount.
rows.english_description: Conveyancing fees paid in connection with the city freehold purchase (to the same party).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Conveyancing fees paid in connection with the city freehold purchase, amounting to £0 8s 8d.

rows.description: Candlemas, Corn Price
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 0 shillings, 1 pence. gpt-5-mini misidentified shillings amount.
rows.english_description: Payment for corn (grain) recorded on Candlemas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for corn recorded on Candlemas, amounting to £0 0s 1d.

rows.description: 28th Allowed to Mr. Sadler, Progress Money

rows.english_description: Progress allowance paid to Mr Sadler (travel/inspection allowance).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Progress allowance paid to Mr Sadler, amounting to £0 0s 6d.

rows.description: 27th To Mr. Oliver Bib. Lect: of Michels Benef:
rows.notes: Amounts (2s 10d) confirmed by visual inspection. Description 'Michels Benef:' chosen from gemini-flash's clearer reading. gpt-5-mini correctly noted it was a repeated entry.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Oliver Bib, the lecturer under Michell's benefaction (repeat entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Oliver Bib, the lecturer under Michell's benefaction, amounting to £0 2s 10d.

rows.description: April 3d Lady Day, Corn Price
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 0 shillings, 1 pence. gpt-5-mini misidentified shillings amount.
rows.english_description: Payment for corn (grain) recorded on Lady Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for corn recorded on Lady Day, amounting to £0 0s 1d.

rows.description: 12th To Mr. Fletcher, Bookseller
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 5 shillings, 2 pence. gpt-5-mini misidentified the pounds column for shillings, reading £5 2s 0d.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Fletcher, the bookseller, for books or supplies.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Fletcher, the bookseller, amounting to £0 5s 2d.

rows.description: 13th For a new Hassock and mending an Old one
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Purchase of a new hassock and repair of an old hassock (furnishing repair).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of a new hassock and repair of an old hassock, amounting to £0 2s 6d.

rows.description: To Mr. Tonge, a Bill.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 1 shilling. For pence, '6' followed by a distinct '9' shape (resembling '3q') are visible. Following gemini-flash's interpretation, this '9' is taken as '3q' (0.75 pence fraction), common in old script. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of £1 6s 9d is incorrect on column alignment and '9' as whole pence.
rows.english_description: Payment of a bill to Mr Tonge (unspecified bill).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a bill to Mr Tonge, amounting to £0 1s 6¾d.

rows.description: For serving, Merton to L. Day last
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment for serving at Merton up to the last Lady Day (service duty payment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for serving at Merton up to the last Lady Day, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.description: 27th To John Townſend for Lighting & Paving
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 1 shilling, 9 pence, and 0.75 fraction (the '9' with flourish resembling '3q'). gpt-5-mini's interpretation of £1 19s 0d is incorrect on amounts and column alignment.
rows.english_description: Payment to John Townsend for lighting and paving work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to John Townsend for lighting and paving work, amounting to £0 1s 9¾d.

rows.description: May 24th Placed to the Account of Weston Arrears
rows.notes: Consensus on shillings and pence whole (8s 3d). Visual verification indicates the fraction is 0.25 (a small '4' like character), aligning with gpt-5-mini's fraction interpretation. Corrected 'Merton' to 'Weston' in description based on image.
rows.english_description: Amount placed to the account of Weston as arrears (credited to Weston arrears account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount placed to the account of Weston as arrears, amounting to £0 8s 3¼d.

rows.description: 25th Rd. Sherfield for carrying away bringing Earth & Rubbish &c
rows.notes: Amounts visually verified as £10 0s 8d (gpt-5-mini correct on amounts). Description taken from gemini-flash for including the interlinear note, corrected 'Pd' to 'Rd' from visual.
rows.english_description: Payment to R. Sherfield for carrying away and removing earth and rubbish (site clearance).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to R. Sherfield for carrying away and removing earth and rubbish, amounting to £10 0s 8d.

rows.description: June 16th Allowed Mr. Romsey for rec. Sithewain &c
rows.notes: Amounts (10s 0d) confirmed by visual inspection. Description chosen from gemini-flash's closer reading of 'Romsey for rec. Sithewain &c', confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini's description was significantly different and noted uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Romsey for 'rec. Sithewain' and related items (text unclear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Romsey for 'rec. Sithewain' and related items (description unclear), amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Smith for surveying the Long Wittenham estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Smith for surveying Long Wittenham, amounting to £23 13s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to Collis for land tax and related dues.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Collis for land tax and related dues, amounting to £1 9s 8d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms £10 0s 0d. Both extractors were incorrect on the amounts; gpt-5-mini also had an incorrect description/date ('26th. To Tearles').
rows.english_description: Part payment to J. Pearler (purpose not specified in this line).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to J. Pearler, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Sept. 3d To J. Searles in Part
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini disqualified due to invalid pence value (18) which violates hard rule (pence >= 12). gemini-flash's reading of 5 shillings, 0 pence visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Part payment to J. Searles (purpose not specified in this line).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to J. Searles, amounting to £0 5s 0d.

rows.description: Carpenter's Bill
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini missed this distinct row (it seemed to merge it with the previous entry). gemini-flash correctly identified and extracted £3 14s 0d 0.5 fraction (half-penny mark), which was visually confirmed.
